resources.name: Instituto Camões — Aprender Português
resources.why: Portugal's official language institute: free and paid distance courses in European Portuguese from A1 up, plus certification pathways — the state-backed backbone for structured study alongside this app.

resources.name: CAPLE — Exames de PLE (Universidade de Lisboa)
resources.why: The body that designs and awards the CIPLE/DEPLE/DIPLE exams: official formats, modelos de exame and enrolment — the finish line the app's mock exams mirror.

resources.name: Practice Portuguese
resources.why: The reference audio platform built exclusively on Lisbon Portuguese — 55,000+ native clips, podcasts and 'Shorties' — so your listening ear is trained on pt-PT, never Brazilian.

resources.name: RTP Ensina
resources.why: Free educational video and podcasts from Portugal's public broadcaster: authentic European-Portuguese speech on language, history and culture — ideal graded-to-real listening from B1 up.

resources.name: Dicionário Priberam da Língua Portuguesa
resources.why: The standard free European-Portuguese dictionary (180,000+ entries) with conjugations and synonyms, and it marks Brazilian variants explicitly — so you always know which form is the pt-PT one.

resources.name: Conversation partner
resources.why: Speaking is a scored CAPLE section and nothing replaces real conversation: a tutor, exchange or Portuguese friend turns the app's dialogues into fluency — insist on a speaker from Portugal.

resources.name: Words tab (built-in daily flashcards)
resources.why: The app's own spaced-repetition deck: 2,300 high-frequency European-Portuguese words through B2 with example sentences and the pt-PT voice — your daily vocabulary engine, scheduled every session.
